# Quick Intro to Machine Learning — Hands-On Course

> Machine index for AI assistants. Each entry: notebook path — title — purpose.
> Generated by scripts/gen_llms_txt.py (do not hand-edit). See AGENTS.md to tutor.

## 00_GettingStarted

- [notebooks/00_GettingStarted/09_overfitting_generalization_gap.ipynb](notebooks/00_GettingStarted/09_overfitting_generalization_gap.ipynb) — 09 — Over-/under-fitting and the generalization gap — *Module 00 · Getting Started — notebook 9 of 11*
